task_completion.description: Access the settings for the 'Global Tech Summit 2024' survey in the LimeSurvey admin panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LimeSurvey admin interface is visible with 'Global Tech Summit 2024' selected or displayed in the survey title area.

task_completion.description: Enable public registration for the survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the survey settings (typically under 'Participant settings' or 'Publication & access'), the option for 'Allow public registration' is toggled to 'On' or 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Enable CAPTCHA protection for the public registration form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the survey settings, the option for 'Use CAPTCHA for registration' is toggled to 'On' or 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Add 'Organization' as a custom attribute for survey participants, ensuring it is mandatory and visible on the registration form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the participant attributes management screen (e.g., 'Manage attributes' under Survey participants), an attribute named 'Organization' is added. The settings for making it mandatory and visible on the registration form must be enabled or checked.

task_completion.description: Add 'Job Title' as a custom attribute for survey participants, ensuring it is mandatory and visible on the registration form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the participant attributes management screen, an attribute named 'Job Title' is added. The settings for making it mandatory and visible on the registration form must be enabled or checked.

integrity.description: The agent used the LimeSurvey web GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LimeSurvey web interface in a browser, rather than terminal commands or direct database modifications.

integrity.description: The agent did not just type the expected settings into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of text editors containing the task requirements as a shortcut.

integrity.description: The screenshots show the actual LimeSurvey interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches LimeSurvey's admin panel, not a mock-up, search engine result, or documentation page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Survey Title: 'Global Tech Summit 2024'. Public registration must be enabled (allowregister='Y'). CAPTCHA for registration must be enabled (registration_captcha='Y'). Two new mandatory attributes must be added: 'Organization' and 'Job Title'.
